title: Musk Misled Twitter Investors Before 2022 Buyout, Jury Says
description: Elon Musk defrauded Twitter Inc. investors when he disparaged the company in 2022 in an effort to buy the social media platform for a lower price than his original $44 billion bid, a jury concluded.

title: Super Micro Makes Changes After Smuggling Scandal Crushes Stock
description: Super Micro Computer Inc., the AI computing provider at the center of a smuggling scandal, is working to shore up its compliance operations after a stock rout erased a third of the company’s value.

title: Polymarket’s Latest Pop-Up Is a Sports Bar for Watching the News
description: Polymarket took over a bar near the White House, for a promotional event showcasing the prediction market’s vision of betting on current events as a new form of entertainment.
